sourceRef: tip:Preparing for a chapter change mid-career

slides.headline: Automate Certifications
slides.body: Streamline VA GI Bill® school certifications with VASCO Assistant Pro.

slides.headline: Centralize Data
slides.body: Easily import student information to maintain accuracy.

slides.headline: Simplify Certs
slides.body: Automatically generate and submit Chapter 33 certifications.

slides.headline: Track Compliance
slides.body: Monitor and report on student compliance with VA regulations.

slides.headline: Support Student Veterans
slides.body: Empower students with Yellow Ribbon and GIBill® benefits.

slides.headline: Monitor Changes
slides.body: Stay informed with real-time updates on VA policies and regulations.

outline.caption: Automate VA GI Bill® school certifications, simplify Chapter 33 submissions, and support student veterans with VASCO Assistant Pro.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is Step 3 of 5, 'Track Compliance', as the text is slightly smaller and less prominent compared to the other slides. A slight increase in font size could enhance its visibility.
